offer: For bookkeepers managing 10-30 clients, inefficient categorization of bank transactions causes time-consuming manual bookkeeping. We automate categorization instead of manual categorization of transactions in spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient categorization of bank transactions leads to time-consuming manual bookkeeping.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for bookkeeping advice
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on bookkeeping tools
Direct message outreach to bookkeepers with demo video
Participate in community forums for bookkeeping solutions
try_it: Let users try manual entry for transaction categorization and export functionality for ledger entries on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual-first workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
